recipe.title: Easy pancakes
recipe.description: Jamie Oliver's easy pancake recipe is delicious with fresh fruit, lemon and sugar; or try a savoury pancake with ham and cheese.

steps.descr: Crack the eggs into a blender, then add the flour, milk...
steps.instructions: Crack the eggs into a blender, then add the flour, milk and 1 pinch of sea salt, and blitz until smooth.

on_enter.say: Crack the eggs into a blender, then add the flour, milk and 1 pinch of sea salt, and blitz until smooth.

steps.descr: Pour into a bowl and leave to stand for 15 minutes
steps.instructions: Pour into a bowl and leave to stand for 15 minutes.

on_enter.say: Pour into a bowl and leave to stand for 15 minutes.

steps.descr: Melt the butter (or a drizzle of oil if you want to be a...
steps.instructions: Melt the butter (or a drizzle of oil if you want to be a bit healthier) in a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat, then tilt the pan so the butter coats the surface.

on_enter.say: Melt the butter (or a drizzle of oil if you want to be a bit healthier) in a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat, then tilt the pan so the butter coats the surface.

steps.descr: Pour in 1 ladle of batter and tilt again, so that the...
steps.instructions: Pour in 1 ladle of batter and tilt again, so that the batter spreads all over the base, then cook for 1 to 2 minutes, or until it starts to come away from the sides.

on_enter.say: Pour in 1 ladle of batter and tilt again, so that the batter spreads all over the base, then cook for 1 to 2 minutes, or until it starts to come away from the sides.

steps.descr: Once golden underneath, flip the pancake over and cook...
steps.instructions: Once golden underneath, flip the pancake over and cook for 1 further minute, or until cooked through.

on_enter.say: Once golden underneath, flip the pancake over and cook for 1 further minute, or until cooked through.

steps.descr: Serve straightaway with your favourite topping
steps.instructions: Serve straightaway with your favourite topping.

on_enter.say: Serve straightaway with your favourite topping.
